name: jp.co.unvgi.vtuber-system-base.core-ipc-foundation
description: LocalHost IPC foundation between the UI process (Display 1) and the main output process (Display 2+) for VTuberSystemBase. Provides abstract Pub/Sub and Request/Response over WebSocket (RFC 6455) + JSON, with Unity main-thread dispatch and PlayMode lifecycle integration.

samples.description: Self-loopback PlayMode demo for state/event/request-response over the CoreIpc runtime, plus README with %AppData% port override verification steps.
